1879760.name: Layerworld
1879760.description: In this 2d platformer, your death is merely part of the puzzle. Navigate and solve each level, but be careful, every time you die you're forced to restart the level, this time with a ghost of your previous self roaming your previous path. Face the challenge and see how many ghosts you can avoid, or use the ghosts to your advantage to solve your way out of a dangerous room.
1879760.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
